Flow:   1. initSnapshot(snapshotBlock, snapshotHash)   2. loadTicketsBatch(wallets[], tickets[])  \u2190 repeat until all loaded   3. finalizeSnapshot()   4. prizeNFT.safeTransferFrom(authorizedWallet, raffleAddress, tokenId)   5. setDrawDeadline(blockNumber)   6. requestDraw()  \u2014 pays Pyth Entropy fee in MON, send getDrawFee() as msg.value   7.
